steps.name: THE DAWN GUN
steps.desc: BONUS: a lance of dawnlight that runs the WHOLE lane — pierces every hull, 3× damage.

steps.name: SINGULAR STORM
steps.desc: BONUS: +3 damage, pierce 6, +60% rate. The air itself becomes shrapnel.

steps.name: Chain Lightning
steps.desc: Arcs jump to 3 extra targets, +1 damage.

steps.name: GOD-COIL
steps.desc: BONUS: +50% range, 2× damage. The sky goes white.

steps.name: EVENT TESLA
steps.desc: BONUS: every discharge chains across 24 hulls — a whole convoy lit at once.

steps.name: HEAT DEATH
steps.desc: BONUS: 6 damage per pulse. Entropy always wins.

steps.name: THE LONG WINTER
steps.desc: BONUS: 92% slow — hulls nearly freeze solid — and +70% radius. Spring is cancelled.

steps.name: AP Slugs
steps.desc: Rounds shred armor — damages Aegis hulls.

steps.name: ORBITAL GAUGE
steps.desc: BONUS: 30 damage and the slug NEVER STOPS — pierces the entire lane. Technically a war crime somewhere.

steps.name: Executioner Rounds
steps.desc: Kills non-boss hulls under 15% hp outright.

steps.name: ONE TRUE SHOT
steps.desc: BONUS: 3× damage and executes any non-boss hull under HALF health. The slug remembers your name.

steps.name: EXTINCTION ARC
steps.desc: BONUS: +6 damage, +50% blast. The horizon files a complaint.

steps.name: TACTICAL SUNRISE
steps.desc: BONUS: a six-warhead carpet, 2× damage, 2× blast. Day breaks twice.

steps.name: CARRIER ETERNAL
steps.desc: BONUS: +2 damage, +60% rate. The hangar never sleeps.

steps.name: Locust Doctrine
steps.desc: BONUS: swarms sear hulls - 6 dps burn.

steps.name: SWARM SINGULARITY
steps.desc: BONUS: +4 interceptors, pierce 8. The sky is a verb now.

steps.name: LIGHTHOUSE HEART
steps.desc: BONUS: +60% rate, +30% range auras. The beacon fights too.

steps.name: NULL SECTOR
steps.desc: BONUS: 50% aura slow, +30% radius. Machines forget how to machine.

steps.name: THE UNENDING NOTE
steps.desc: BONUS: marks 8 hulls at once with permanent resonance. The whole convoy hears it.

steps.name: SONG OF ENDINGS
steps.desc: BONUS: three marks, +5 damage. Every machine hears its own name.

steps.name: FINAL DAWN
steps.desc: BONUS: +40% range, pierce 20. The lane becomes a sunbeam.

steps.name: WHITE HOLE
steps.desc: BONUS: an unbroken beam through the ENTIRE convoy, 2× damage. Color was a phase.

steps.name: HARVEST OF ASHES
steps.desc: BONUS: gnaw 22 dps, +30% radius. Leave nothing for the crows.

steps.name: WORLD-EATER BLOOM
steps.desc: BONUS: +50% radius, gnaw +10 dps. The cupful remembers being an ocean.

steps.name: SUPERNOVA REQUIEM
steps.desc: BONUS: damage 27.5, reach 425. Once per cycle, the war hears a star's whole life.

steps.name: STAR REBORN
steps.desc: BONUS: +12.5 damage, slow 40%. It remembers being warm.

steps.name: Twin Lanterns
steps.desc: A second beam, opposite the first.

steps.name: THE UNBLINKING EYE
steps.desc: BONUS: 2.2× damage, +30% length. Nothing crosses the light unseen — or intact.

steps.name: PRISM CROWN
steps.desc: BONUS: deep freeze (60% slow) + burn 20 dps across the sweep.

steps.name: DAYBREAK ENGINE
steps.desc: BONUS: 2× damage, +60% rotation. The night ends on your schedule now.

steps.name: Binary Horizon
steps.desc: BONUS: opens two gates per cycle.

steps.name: THE MOUTH OF MIDNIGHT
steps.desc: BONUS: huge breach, 62 damage, brutal drag. The convoy exits through itself.

steps.name: Second Mouth
steps.desc: Opens a second gate on another cluster.

steps.name: Causal Burn
steps.desc: Breach applies 22 dps burn for 3 seconds.

steps.name: Gate Choir
steps.desc: BONUS: opens three gates per cycle.

steps.name: OMNIPRESENT EXIT
steps.desc: BONUS: five gates, unlimited reach, deeper slow. Every road leads through the abyss.

steps.name: STAR-EATER
steps.desc: BONUS: sear 34 dps, +40% radius. It burns the cold itself.

steps.name: Warding Glow
steps.desc: Reveals cloaked hulls in the lattice.

steps.name: THE LONG NOON
steps.desc: BONUS: +60% radius, sear +12 dps. A noon that does not end.

steps.name: THE PIT
steps.desc: BONUS: a column simply stops existing forward. Brutal pull, deep slow, wide.

steps.name: Reverse Polarity
steps.desc: Push hulls FORWARD, away from the anchor.

steps.name: Phase Detector
steps.desc: Reveals cloaked hulls in the field.

steps.name: SCATTER ENGINE
steps.desc: BONUS: violent forward scatter — shatters heal-clusters and escorts.

steps.name: THE EXILE GATE
steps.desc: BONUS: hurls hulls forward then strands them mid-lane in your kill-zone.

steps.name: SECOND SUNRISE
steps.desc: BONUS: 2× damage, pierce 6. Dawn comes twice, and the dark does not.

steps.name: THE LAST LIGHT
steps.desc: BONUS: 3× damage, executes any non-boss hull under HALF health. The dark blinks first.

steps.name: Tuned Intake
steps.desc: Consumes up to 2 resonance stacks per strike.

steps.name: Backscatter
steps.desc: Echo spreads to 2 nearby hulls over a wider radius.

steps.name: RESONANT ENGINE
steps.desc: BONUS: consumes 3 stacks and spreads to 3 hulls.

steps.name: THE RETURNING NOTE
steps.desc: BONUS: two antiphons per cycle, 4-stack consume cap, +4 damage.

steps.name: Phase Ears
steps.desc: Can hear and target cloaked hulls.

steps.name: Call and Answer
steps.desc: Strikes two marked hulls per cycle.

steps.name: BLACK CHORUS
steps.desc: BONUS: consumed stacks leave an 8 dps energy burn.

steps.name: FINAL ANTIPHON
steps.desc: BONUS: three targets, +5 damage, stronger echo spread.

steps.name: Target Solver
steps.desc: +50% mark rate and stronger focus priority.

steps.name: FIRE CONTROL
steps.desc: BONUS: marks three hulls per cycle.

steps.name: ONE TARGET WAR
steps.desc: BONUS: brutal focus priority and +35% range.

steps.name: Escort Confusion
steps.desc: Nearby escorts are caught in the slow wake.

steps.name: False Gap
steps.desc: The wake drags escorts backward along the lane.

steps.name: THE WRONG EXIT
steps.desc: BONUS: huge scramble wake, hard drag, 6s mark.

steps.name: IRON RAIN
steps.desc: BONUS: +2 damage, +40% rate, pierce 8. The sky rusts.

steps.name: SCATTERSTORM
steps.desc: BONUS: ten shells, +2 damage. Everything in the lane is downwind.

steps.name: THE LONG SUMMER
steps.desc: BONUS: burn zones sear 28 dps, +40% radius, linger 10s.

steps.name: Magma Core
steps.desc: Burn zones sear 14 dps, +2 blast damage.

steps.name: ASHFALL
steps.desc: BONUS: four shells, burn zones sear 22 dps.

steps.name: CONTINENTAL GUN
steps.desc: BONUS: 2× damage, pierces the WHOLE lane, shreds. The slug arrives before the order to fire.

steps.name: Twin Drivers
steps.desc: Two heavy slugs per shot, slower cycle.

steps.name: THE LAST WORD
steps.desc: BONUS: 2× damage, execute 40%. It does not leave survivors to disagree.

strategies.name: kinetic-only
strategies.desc: Pulse + Railgun — kinetic damage, helpless vs Aegis armor

strategies.name: energy-only
strategies.desc: Tesla + Drone + Prism — pure energy, ignores armor

strategies.name: cheap-rush
strategies.desc: Wall of cheap low-tier Pulse + Tesla, no commits

strategies.name: one-of-each
strategies.desc: One of every tower, mid-tier — diversity over focus

strategies.name: few-max-tier
strategies.desc: A handful of fully-committed end-game towers
